title: Phase 4: Add Morse migration support
description: New MorseKeyManager class wrapping Morse key/claim C functions
close_reason: Created MorseKeyManager class wrapping all 6 Morse C API functions: LoadMorsePrivateKey, GetMorseAddress, NewSerializedSignedMsgClaimMorseAccount, NewSerializedSignedMsgClaimMorseApplication, NewSerializedSignedMsgClaimMorseSupplier, SignMorseClaimMsg. Exported from __init__.py.

title: Phase 7: Packaging and docs
description: Version bump, README update, pyproject.toml updates

title: Phase 5: Bug fixes and polish
description: Fix platform comparison bug, cross-platform pthread sizes, gas_settings in TxClient, BlockQueryClient.block() method
close_reason: Fixed: BlockQueryClient.block() method added, urlparse immutability bug fixed, Config wrapper added to depinject, self_ref typo fixed, redundant check_err/check_ref removed from TxClient, all TODO_IN_THIS_COMMIT comments cleaned up (11 total across 6 files).

title: Phase 1: Regenerate proto definitions
description: Update buf config, regenerate Python protobufs from canonical poktroll source, fix imports, add migration module
close_reason: Proto regeneration complete: namespace migrated from poktroll.* to pocket.*, all 9 modules generated including migration, buf.gen.yaml updated to v2, fix_proto_imports.py updated for .pyi files

title: Epic: Catch up Python bindings to Go poktroll clients
description: Master tracking issue for bringing poktroll-clients-py up to parity with libpoktroll-clients C API and canonical poktroll Go clients. Covers proto regeneration, FFI expansion, new Python client classes, Morse migration support, bug fixes, and tests.

title: Phase 3: Add QueryClient Python class
description: New QueryClient class wrapping all QueryClient_* C functions with proto deserialization
close_reason: Created QueryClient class wrapping all 20 QueryClient_* C API functions. Added deserialize_proto/deserialize_proto_array helpers to protobuf.py. All proto imports verified. Exported from __init__.py.

title: Phase 2: Expand CFFI declarations
description: Add all ~32 missing C function declarations, structs (gas_settings, morse_signature, serialized_proto), fix platform bug
close_reason: Expanded CFFI declarations from 11 to 46 (41 API functions + 5 async helpers). Added gas_settings, morse_signature, serialized_proto_array structs. Fixed platform detection bug, proto struct name mismatch, and missing error parameters in EventsQueryClient and TxClient.

title: Phase 6: Tests
description: Add test_query_client.py, test_morse.py, update existing tests for new API signatures
close_reason: Fixed test_tx_client.py broken proto imports (poktroll.* -> pocket.*, removed deleted MsgSend). Added block() method tests to test_block_client.py. Added Config test to test_depinject.py. Created test_query_client.py (6 tests) and test_morse_key_manager.py (3 skipped integration tests).
